_meta.description: BrandFlow Insights — manually curated factual articles. Update this file through editorial review only. The website fetches this JSON on each page load.
_meta.n8n_instructions: Editorial policy: publish only factual, verifiable content with reliable sources and internal review. Article slugs must be URL-safe strings. Dates in ISO 8601 format.

articles.title: The 5 Business Processes Every SA SME Should Automate First
articles.excerpt: From invoice processing to lead follow-up, these five high-impact automations deliver measurable ROI within weeks — not months. We break down exactly what to automate, what tools to use, and what to expect.

articles.title: How a Cape Town Logistics Firm Cut Admin Time by 78%
articles.excerpt: A real-world case study showing how a 12-person logistics company automated their proof-of-delivery, invoicing, and driver dispatch workflows — saving 32 hours per week.

articles.title: POPIA & Automation: What SA Businesses Need to Know
articles.excerpt: Automating your business doesn't mean compromising on compliance. Here's how to build POPIA-compliant automation workflows that protect customer data while maximising efficiency.

articles.title: n8n vs Zapier for South African SMEs: An Honest Comparison
articles.excerpt: Both tools promise to automate your business, but which one makes sense for a South African SME? We compare pricing, capabilities, and data residency — with a clear recommendation.
